summary: Completed comprehensive testing of User Details feature (iteration 6). Backend: 24/24 tests passed covering TMDB search, profile updates (gender, bio, actors, movies), avatar upload, and Letterboxd CSV import/export. Frontend: All UI elements present and functional including Details menu item in UserMenu, /details page navigation, form fields, TMDB movie search with debounce, actor tags, movie posters with max 5 limit, Letterboxd dropzone, and Save button with success toast.

ui_bugs.issue: Form state not re-syncing when user prop changes - after page reload, saved data doesn't populate in form fields even though backend has it
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add useEffect to sync local state when user prop changes: useEffect(() => { setGender(user?.gender || ''); setBio(user?.bio || ''); ... }, [user])

issues: Page accessible without login - should redirect to login or show 'Please log in to access your details' message

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/movies/search-tmdb returns movie results with id, title, year, poster_url, rating
Backend: Empty/short query returns empty results
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile updates gender field
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile updates bio with 150 char limit
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile updates favorite_actors array (max 20)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile updates favorite_movies array (max 5)
Backend: POST /api/auth/upload-avatar accepts JPEG and returns avatar_url
Backend: POST /api/auth/upload-avatar rejects non-image files
Backend: POST /api/auth/import-letterboxd parses basic CSV format
Backend: POST /api/auth/import-letterboxd parses full Letterboxd format with Rating, WatchedDate, tmdbID
Backend: POST /api/auth/import-letterboxd accepts Name column instead of Title
Backend: GET /api/auth/letterboxd-data returns imported data
Backend: All authenticated endpoints return 401 without token
Frontend: Details menu item visible in UserMenu dropdown when logged in
Frontend: Clicking Details navigates to /details page
Frontend: Details page shows Profile Photo section with avatar-upload data-testid
Frontend: Gender select dropdown works with all options (Prefer not to say, Male, Female, Non-binary)
Frontend: Bio input accepts text with character counter (0/150)
Frontend: Actor input allows adding via Enter key and + button
Frontend: Actor tags appear with X button for removal
Frontend: TMDB movie search shows results after 350ms debounce
Frontend: Movie search results show poster, title, year, rating
Frontend: Clicking movie result adds poster to Top 5 Favorites grid
Frontend: Movie posters have remove button (data-testid='remove-movie-{i}')
Frontend: Letterboxd dropzone visible with instructions
Frontend: Save Details button saves data to backend
Frontend: Success toast 'Details saved' appears after save
Frontend: Back button navigates to home page
Frontend: Floating nav bar visible on /details page
action_items: Add useEffect in UserDetails.js to re-sync state when user prop changes (lines 35-40)
Add auth guard for /details route - redirect to home or show login prompt if not authenticated
critical_code_review_comments: UserDetails.js initializes useState from props but doesn't update when props change - common React anti-pattern. Should use useEffect dependency.
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Backend properly enforces limits: bio max 150 chars, actors max 20, movies max 5
Avatar upload validation correctly rejects non-image files and enforces 2MB limit
test_credentials: Test user registered during testing with unique IDs - no fixed credentials needed
seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically using timestamp+uuid for unique emails/usernames
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Details feature testing complete. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_user_details.py. Key data-testids: details-menu-item, details-back-btn, avatar-upload, avatar-file-input, gender-select, bio-input, actor-input, add-actor-btn, movie-search-input, movie-result-{id}, remove-movie-{i}, letterboxd-dropzone, letterboxd-file-input, reimport-letterboxd-btn, save-details-btn. Main issue: UserDetails component needs useEffect to sync state with user prop changes. JWT tokens expire after 7 days. Avatar uploads saved to /app/uploads/avatars/.
